productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Heeled Brown Silver Strap Heels
description: These slip-on heels from catwalk are perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be worn with casuals, semi-formals and formals. The simple design is complemented with metallic straps for added style.UpperPlastic strap covering the forefoot and extending on the sides to the midfoot for a snug Fit and great eye appealTextured footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
